items: Roki Sasaki blanked The Angels for 7.0 innings, striking out 10 in The Dodgers's 1-0 win.
Drew Rasmussen blanked Miami for 7.0 innings, striking out 9 in Tampa Bay's 6-0 win.
Randal Grichuk homered 2 times in Philadelphia's 8-6 win over Chicago White Sox.
Casey Schmitt homered 2 times, driving in 3 as San Francisco beat Chicago Cubs, 18-3.
Willy Adames homered 2 times, driving in 4 as San Francisco beat Chicago Cubs, 18-3.
Luis García Jr. homered 2 times, driving in 6 as Washington beat Arizona, 14-1.
Luis García Jr. had 6 RBI, with 2 home runs as Washington beat Arizona, 14-1.
Adley Rutschman had 5 RBI, with 1 home run as Baltimore beat Toronto, 13-3.
The Mets pitching combined to shut out San Diego, 5-0.
Tampa Bay pitching combined to shut out Miami, 6-0.
